\tzpentry{ID5927}{Quantum Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5927 introduces Quantum Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} E_{m,n} = \hbar c \sqrt{m^2 + n^2 + \kappa \cos(\theta_1-\theta_2)} \end{equation}
